response: convert The initial art collection tax is $380,000 after applying the discount to the $2 million valuation. convert The securities portfolio yields $435,000 in tax after deducting the charitable contribution from the $3 million base. convert The original real estate portfolio generates $800,000 in tax based on the progressive rates applied to $5 million. convert Summing these figures results in a total initial estate tax liability of $1,615,000. convert A 10% increase in the real estate value raises the portfolio to $5.5 million for recalculation. convert The adjusted real estate tax becomes $850,000 due to the additional $500,000 falling into the highest bracket. convert Adding this new real estate tax to the unchanged art and securities liabilities gives a revised total of $1,665,000.
